name: Write Tests
prompt:
Read the file `seed/calculator.py` which contains a `Calculator` class. Write a comprehensive test file `workspace/test_calculator.py` using pytest. Your tests should:

1. Test all four operations (add, subtract, multiply, divide)
2. Test edge cases (division by zero, negative numbers, floats)
3. Test the `history` property
4. Test the `clear` method
5. Have at least 8 test functions

The tests should all pass when run with `pytest workspace/test_calculator.py`.
